schemas.definition: z.object({ locationId: z.string(), businessName: z.string(), address: z.string(), phone: z.string(), email: z.string().email(), websiteUrl: z.string().url().nullable(), zelleRecipientName: z.string(), zelleContactInfo: z.string(), zelleInstructions: z.string().nullable(), notifyNewLead: z.boolean(), notifyNewEnrollment: z.boolean(), notifyPaymentReceived: z.boolean() })

z.object({ businessName: z.string().min(1), address: z.string().min(1), phone: z.string().min(1), email: z.string().email(), websiteUrl: z.string().url().optional(), zelleRecipientName: z.string().min(1), zelleContactInfo: z.string().min(1), zelleInstructions: z.string().optional(), notifyNewLead: z.boolean(), notifyNewEnrollment: z.boolean(), notifyPaymentReceived: z.boolean() })
